event_description: my own reflection in the mirror tried to talk to me
Beta, kunwara hi mar jaayega tu
He asks me to check the kitchen or else you will die
The faucet turns on on its own midway when I am peeing
An icy hand pats your back when I am alone and when I turn back no one is there
I heard someone chewing behind my back when I was alone
I see by face blurring in the mirror and it appears scary
someone removes my blanket at 3 AM and laughs maniacally
I hear footstep around 3 AM and they come close to me and then they stop when I get up
I saw a message in mirror, AGLA NUMBER TERA HAI
I keep hearing a whisper TU BHI JAYEGA
My shadow tries to strangle me
someone sings jeene k hai chaar din par tera bas 1 din baaki hai
suddenly temperature drops and I shiver around 3 am
someone asks me was it worth it
I see by face blurring in the mirror and it appears scary
The faucet turns on on its own midway when I am peeing
Beta, kunwara hi mar jaayega tu
